author: @thecryptohulk
executive_summary: A YouTube content creator focused on cryptocurrency and digital assets submitted a comment urging the SEC to immediately implement crypto, blockchain, and fintech technologies into all applicable systems. The letter does not substantively address the specific rulemaking topics covered under File No. S7-2026-20, including order competition, best execution, tick size reform, or access fee reform. The comment is broadly pro-crypto advocacy with no engagement with market microstructure issues.
economic_arguments: No substantive economic arguments provided; author asserts crypto and blockchain are the future of the planet without supporting analysis.
retail_investor_arguments: No retail investor-specific arguments provided, though the author is themselves a retail-oriented content creator.
recommended_actions: Immediate implementation of crypto, blockchain, digital assets, and fintech technologies into every applicable system.
key_quotes: Crypto, Blockchain, Digital Assets, Fintech and all related terminology shall be the basis for the future of the planet and thereby shall be implemented immediately into every system where possible ASAP.
Let's get this done to modernize the way we live.
